## Scope

Describe the change and the FINORA workstream it belongs to.

## Validation

- [ ] Ruff
- [ ] Mypy
- [ ] Pytest and coverage
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, model weights, or licensed datasets committed
- [ ] Forecasting changes use chronological/out-of-sample validation
- [ ] Cost, calibration, bias, security, and audit impacts documented
- [ ] Human review and financial disclaimers remain enforced

## Evidence

Link reports, benchmarks, issue, and reproducibility hashes. State every skipped or
externally blocked gate.

## Risk and rollback

Describe failure modes, monitoring, rollback, and whether model-risk/compliance review
is required.
